query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_COMMENT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'users'
  AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('isDeleted', 'deletionReason', 'anonymizedAt', 'deletedAt')
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_COMMENT
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'users'
  AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('isDeleted', 'deletionReason', 'anonymizedAt', 'deletedAt')
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

rows.COLUMN_COMMENT: 注销状态：0=正常，1=注销中（30天缓冲期），2=已脱敏
用户填写的注销原因（可选）

stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT	COLUMN_COMMENT
deletedAt	timestamp	YES	NULL	
isDeleted	tinyint(1)	NO	0	注销状态：0=正常，1=注销中（30天缓冲期），2=已脱敏
deletionReason	text	YES	NULL	用户填写的注销原因（可选）
anonymizedAt	datetime	YES	NULL	数据脱敏完成时间
